whatIBuild.title: What I build
whatIBuild.lead: High-performance static websites for local businesses that need a polished online presence—fast, easy to maintain, and priced for small budgets instead of complex web apps.
whatIBuild.note: I currently do not offer e-commerce stores, custom backend systems, or user portals.
whatIBuild.pageStructures: Most small business websites include core pages like Home, About, Services, Gallery, FAQs, and Contact. Every project is different, and the final layout is customized to your goals.

whatsIncluded.title: What's included
whatsIncluded.lead: Every project is custom-built from the ground up—typically about five core pages for a small business site.

items.title: Responsive design
items.description: Fully mobile-friendly and optimized for desktops, tablets, and phones.

items.title: Handcrafted layout
items.description: Built to fit your brand and budget—not a one-size template you are stuck fighting.

items.title: Content management (Sveltia CMS)
items.description: A free, open-source CMS tailored to your site—so you can update wording, prices, and photos yourself without waiting on me for every little change.

items.title: Essentials integration
items.description: Contact forms, Google Maps, and Google Business Profile mapping.

items.title: Social & SEO basics
items.description: Social profile links plus page titles, meta descriptions, sensible headings, a sitemap, and fast load times—so search engines can understand your site. Not a ranking guarantee.

items.title: Security & launch
items.description: Custom domain configuration, secure HTTPS, deployment, and initial revisions.

items.title: Performance-focused
items.description: Lightweight, static builds that load quickly and stay simple to host and maintain.

hosting.title: Hosting & reliability
hosting.lead: Sites deploy on modern static hosting—typically free or very low cost (for example GitHub Pages)—with fast loads, strong security, and none of the monthly builder fees.
hosting.ownership: You own your domain, content, accounts, and live site. I handle setup, technical configuration, and deployment so you are never locked into a proprietary platform or an expensive hosting plan.
hosting.cms: Content edits run through Sveltia CMS—a free CMS customized to your pages and fields—so day-to-day wording and photos stay in your hands after launch.

approach.title: My approach
approach.lead: Every business is at a different stage. Some clients have branding, photography, and copy ready; others start from scratch.
approach.body: Where it helps, I share practical recommendations from industry experience—organizing content, collecting project photos, encouraging reviews, or standing out online. I do not offer standalone marketing services, but I am transparent about what I believe will genuinely help your business succeed.

integrations.title: Third-party integrations
integrations.lead: When it makes sense, trusted external services expand your site’s utility without bloating the code.

items.label: Advanced image galleries and analytics tools
